reviewer.evidencePolicy: Only mark the canonical curation-before-HITL boundary satisfied; do not infer semantic approval of every canonical mapping.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names packet-backed canonical curation and a HITL boundary, which are protected by canonical-map builder tests and curation-flow audit tests.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by canonical-map builder tests, canonical curation audit tests, a regenerated canonical map packet, and spec lint over the user-facing and maintainer-facing spec indexes.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep canonical-map builder and curation-flow audit tests aligned when changing raw claim compression, canonical indexes, or HITL entry rules.
